{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Wei exiles
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven's Glory]] members were reportedly after [[Wei exiles]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
